fixed_amount.description: Fixed commission amount per approved sale (used when mode=fixed)

fixed_meta_ads.description: Override: fixed commission for Meta Ads sales

fixed_graphic_design.description: Override: fixed commission for Graphic Design Retainer sales

fixed_web_development.description: Override: fixed commission for Web Development sales

fixed_social_media.description: Override: fixed commission for Social Media Management sales

commission_rate.description: Percentage commission rate e.g. 5 for 5% (used when mode=percentage)

minimum_payout.description: Minimum balance required to request payout

payout_cooldown_hours.description: Hours to wait after approval before payout can be processed

one_commission_per_client.description: Only one commission per first successful purchase per referred client
